memory.query: dashboard skill CRUD ingest impact tab overflow

results.title: Dashboard home landing page with system status + usage
results.content: Built /dashboard/ landing page (previously redirected to /dashboard/clients). Now renders: (1) API health strip via new getServiceHealth() helper pinging /health; (2) inventory KPI cards for Clients/Repositories/Workflows/Users (counted from list endpoints); (3) usage metrics from /v1/admin/metrics-summary — active sessions, tool calls (+success%), HTTP requests (+error% for >=400), auth events (+top type); (4) recent activity — last 8 audit events via listAudit. Manual refresh + optional 30s auto-refresh. Client-side auth gate in src/scripts/dashboard-home.ts calls getDashboardBootstrapState + getAdminSession; unauthenticated → /dashboard/login, no admin users → /dashboard/setup. Old dashboard-entry.ts deleted. Added getServiceHealth() and HealthStatus type in src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts.

results.title: Repository-first dashboard entry and unified header
results.content: Made /dashboard and post-login browser flow land on /dashboard/repositories instead of /dashboard/clients. Updated src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py, src/dashboard/src/scripts/dashboard-entry.ts, and src/dashboard/src/scripts/login-page.ts to keep server-side and client-side redirects aligned. Refactored src/dashboard/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.astro with showPageIntro so pages with their own hero sections do not render a duplicate title block, and enabled that mode across the registry/detail/dashboard shells. Updated transition trackers to mark the delivered transition phases DONE and moved remaining enhancements into backlog language. Validation: bun run check, uv run pytest tests/integration/test_setup_dashboard_gate.py tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, uv run ruff check ..., uv run mypy src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py.

results.title: Astro clients detail route split
results.content: Split the dashboard clients screen into /dashboard/clients and /dashboard/clients/detail using dedicated Astro shells. Kept the project static-build safe by passing clientId via query param instead of a dynamic file route, and updated the shared clients-page.ts script to read query param first while preserving legacy path parsing.

results.title: Components docs page uses left content and sticky right menu
results.content: Updated src/app/components/page.tsx into a documentation-style layout with main content on the left and a sticky 'On this page' navigation menu on the right. The right menu tracks active sections via IntersectionObserver, and the main content currently wraps the Combobox demo and API notes as a reusable docs-page pattern.

results.title: D3.js Graph Explorer Refactor
results.content: Replaced static Canvas graph on minder/src/dashboard with D3.js v7 force-directed renderer. Pattern: D3GraphRenderer class (extends d3.SimulationNodeDatum/SimulationLinkDatum), forceManyBody+forceLink+forceCollide+forceCenter, d3.zoom for pan/zoom, SVG glow filter for selected nodes, drag-to-pin. Tab nav: Graph|Overview|Search|Impact|Settings. Dark canvas (radial-gradient dark navy). Legend overlay, tooltip, zoom controls overlay. Three renderer instances: repoRenderer (eager), searchRenderer/impactRenderer (lazy on first use). bun add d3 @types/d3. CSS classes (tab-btn, tab-btn-active, graph-ctrl-btn) in global.css — NOT Astro scoped style (Tailwind v4 @apply breaks in scoped blocks). Build: astro build passes.
